not_a_study: Not dual-blind; not a blinded independent inter-rater reliability study.

riddle.first_pass_author_plausible_rate_note: Author first-pass operational rates retained in Group2 tables (e.g. 86/100 style operational review).
riddle.note: Partner confirmation rows are manual project review, not blinded independent ratings.

falco.first_pass_author_plausible_rate_note: Author first-pass operational rates retained in Group2 tables (e.g. 78/100 style operational review).
falco.note: Partner confirmation rows are manual project review, not blinded independent ratings.

process: Author and project partner manually inspected outputs using review applications/worksheets. Mixed-source agreement numerics are withdrawn as independent-rater claims. Canonical provenance: outputs/03_anonymisation/19_visual_eligibility_gate/05_manual_review_provenance.csv
canonical_claim: The author and project partner manually inspected and corrected annotations and relevant outputs using dedicated review applications. This was a structured project review process, not a blinded human-participant study.
